# procrastivity

A [Claude Code](https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code) plugin marketplace.

## Plugins

<!-- BEGIN PLUGINS (generated by contrib/readme — do not edit) -->
| Plugin | Description | Version |
| ------ | ----------- | ------- |
| [clast](https://github.com/procrastivity/clast) | Capture, curate, and surface Claude Code session history across all your projects. | v0.1.0 |
| [direnv Session Loader](https://github.com/procrastivity/direnv-session-loader) | Loads the project's direnv .envrc at session start (worktree-aware) so Claude Code's non-interactive Bash tool inherits the environment. | v0.2.0 |
| [prtend](https://github.com/procrastivity/prtend) | Tend your PR while you pretend you're actually still there. | v0.0.4 |
| [wip](https://github.com/procrastivity/wip) | wip — distill workflows; ranked next actions, status, and intake shaping from inside Claude Code. | v0.0.18 |
<!-- END PLUGINS -->

## Install

### Add the marketplace

From within Claude Code:

```
/plugin marketplace add procrastivity/claude-plugins
```

From the command line:

```
claude plugin marketplace add procrastivity/claude-plugins
```

### Install a plugin

Pick a plugin from the table above (replace `<plugin>` with its name).

From within Claude Code:

```
/plugin install <plugin>@procrastivity
```

From the command line:

```
claude plugin install <plugin>@procrastivity
```

## Update

Refresh the marketplace to pull in newly added or updated plugins.

From within Claude Code:

```
/plugin marketplace update procrastivity
```

From the command line:

```
claude plugin marketplace update procrastivity
```
